name: Banana Pudding Splits
recipeInstructions:
If Bing cherries are not available, use 4 Maraschino cherries.
1. In a blender, process yogurt on high speed for 30 seconds, then add pudding mix and process 1 minute, scraping down sides of the container as necessary.
2. Cut each banana into 6 diagonal slices and sprinkle with lemon juice.
3. Arrange 2 banana quarters into each of 4 goblets or dessert dishes, top with 1/4 of the pudding mixture. Sprinkle each portion with 1/4 of the pistachios, then top each with 1 tablespoon whipped topping and 1 cherry.
